batch_objective: B-02 (P1, baseline backlog 2026-07-09): patch-editor check results explain themselves. (1) OPERATOR-DECIDED behavior change (round-3, 2026-07-09): drop the collective has_errors taint -- only entries carrying an attributable error become uncheckable (each with reason_code + display reason); healthy entries still checked; wrong document kind stays a whole-run block with ONE loud run-level reason; genuinely document-global faults still block with a reason. (2) Reason taxonomy on CheckRunEntry/CheckRunResult (doc-kind, doc-fault, entry-fault, partial, outside, no-image), rendered in check rows + status. (3) Checks help affordance extension. (4) In-batch: scrub the markup-enabled log-label funnel (pre-existing CHG-KIND-UNKNOWN C-17 exposure). Section 6.5 before/after for the taint change; apply gate explicitly untouched.
standing_authorization: Same session model as batches 29/31/32 (operator: 'Punch it' 3-lane dispatch; 'Merged, continue!'; round-3 taint decision message; '/dev-flow-sync and continue'): run phases autonomously -- each gate = do work, present packet in-conversation, self-approve under this auth, advance; report ALL decisions.
